title: Entrance Antiphon LR42
author: Sarah Hart
snippet: O sing a new song to the Lord; Sing to the Lord, all the earth. In his presence are majesty and splendor, Strength and honor in his holy place.

title: Psalm 27
author: Francesca LaRosa
snippet: The Lord is my light and my salvation.

title: John 1:14a
author: Steve Angrisano
snippet: The Word of God became flesh and dwelt among us. To those who accepted him, He gave power to be come children of God.

title: The Goodness of the Lord
author: Scott Soper
snippet: I believe, I believe, I shall see the goodness of the Lord in the land, in the land of the living.

title: Communion Antiphon LR43
author: Josh Blakesley
snippet: Look toward the Lord and be radiant; Let your faces not be abashed.

title: I Am the Bread of Life
author: Steve Angrisano/Tom Booth
snippet: I am the Bread of Life, I am the hope in night, I am the door wide open, I am the shepherds might, I am the truth and light, I am the way and life, I Am Who Am and I am for you: Come and follow me.

title: Great Are You Lord
author: Jason Ingram, Leslie Jordan and David Leonard
snippet: You give life, You are love. You bring light to the darkness. You give hope, You restore, Every heart that is broken. And great, are You, Lord.

title: Tell The Good News
author: SUNO xJim Ngo
snippet: With open hands and open hearts We share the light that Christ has shown His word of hope for all the world Let every soul proclaim his love.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
